title: 9 Contingency Procedures for Returning AFT Transactions
body_text:
9	Contingency Procedures for Returning AFT Transactions
9.1	Overview of Contingency Procedures for Returning AFT Transactions
If financial institutions canГўВҖВҷt transmit their I & J file (BC only) or canГўВҖВҷt enter their Canadian and/or US dollar AFT returns on the Online Return System (ORS), Central 1 will process the AFT returns on behalf of financial institutions on a best efforts basis. Depending on the problem, email the I & J file to Central 1 (BC credit unions only) or enter the AFT returns on ServiceNow. If ServiceNow is unavailable, complete the Request to Process AFT Returns, Form 1249, and send it to Central 1.
Advise Central 1 of the contingency situation by 3:00 pm PT, Monday to Friday.
AFT Desk
Phone:
1-800-661-6813
ext.
5962
Fax:
604-730-4422
Email:
aftdesk@central1.com
AFT returns submitted in a contingency situation are processed on a best efforts basis and may be subject to additional fees. Class A credit unions in BC and Ontario can refer to the Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725.
Related Information
Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule,
Form 2725
(available to Class A credit unions in BC and Ontario)
9.2	Emailing the I & J File to Central 1 ГўВҖВ“ BC Only
If an I & J file was created successfully but couldnГўВҖВҷt be sent, email the file to Central 1ГўВҖВҷs AFT Desk. Proceed as follows:
Create an email with the following information:
ГўВҲВ’
Financial institution name and branch
ГўВҲВ’
Originator ID
ГўВҲВ’
Reason the file couldnГўВҖВҷt be sent to Central 1ГўВҖВҷs File and Report Exchange
ГўВҲВ’
Item count
ГўВҲВ’
File total
Attach the I & J file to the email. DonГўВҖВҷt copy and paste it into the body of the email.
Email the file to
aftdesk@central1.com
by 3:30 pm PT, Monday to Friday.
9.3	Sending AFT Returns to Central 1 via ServiceNow
If you canГўВҖВҷt create AFT returns using the normal process (i.e., by entering AFT returns on the Online Return System (ORS) or creating an I & J file), submit the AFT returns on ServiceNow. Proceed as follows:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 1.
Note: 	YouГўВҖВҷll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if itГўВҖВҷs your first login to the Client Centre, youГўВҖВҷve deleted your cookies, or youГўВҖВҷre using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 1: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
, then select
Production Applications
. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
ServiceNow
. See Figure 3.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If youГўВҖВҷve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under ГўВҖВңMy FavouritesГўВҖВқ.
Figure 3: Accessing ServiceNow
Select
Service Catalogue
. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: ServiceNow ГўВҖВ“ Accessing the Service Catalogue
Select
Electronic Payments
and then select
Request to Process AFT Returns
. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: Selecting Request to Process AFT Returns
Complete the Request to Process AFT Returns page as follows. See Figure 6 and Figure 7.
ГўВ‘
Enter the branch number.
ГўВ‘ВЎ
Select the currency of the AFT transaction(s). If there are Canadian and US dollar transactions, create a separate ServiceNow request for each currency type.
ГўВ‘Вў
Describe the contingency situation (e.g., users are unable to access ORS).
ГўВ‘ВЈ
Use the drop-down menu to select one of the following request types.
ГўВҲВ’
Single AFT Return
ГўВҲВ’
Multiple AFT Return
Single AFT Return
If returning a single transaction, attach a copy of the CCD Report. See Figure 6.
ГўВ‘ВӨ
Enter additional comments if necessary.
ГўВ‘ВҘ
Select
Submit Form
. The request is sent to Central 1 and a ServiceNow ticket number is created.
Multiple AFT Return
ГўВ‘ВӨ
Alternatively, if returning multiple transactions, select the
Click here to download
link to complete the spreadsheet. See Figure 7. The fields in the spreadsheet are the same as those displayed when entering the details of a single AFT return. Save the file and then select the
Click here to attach files
link to upload the file to ServiceNow. Follow the prompts.
ГўВ‘ВҘ
Enter additional comments if necessary.
ГўВ‘ВҰ
Select
Submit Form
. The request is sent to Central 1 and a ServiceNow ticket number is created.
Figure 6: Request to Process AFT Returns ГўВҖВ“ Single Transaction
Figure 7: Request to Process AFT Returns ГўВҖВ“ Multiple Transactions
9.4	Sending AFT Returns to Central 1 Manually
Proceed as follows if you canГўВҖВҷt create AFT returns using the normal process (i.e., by entering AFT returns on the Online Return System (ORS) or creating an I & J file) and ServiceNow is unavailable:
Complete the Request to Process AFT Returns, Form 1249. Central 1 will only accept this form if ServiceNow is unavailable. See Figure 8.
Important
:	Complete a separate Request to Process AFT Returns, Form 1249, for Canadian and US dollar AFT returns.
ГўВ‘
Select either US Dollar AFT Returns or Canadian Dollar AFT Returns and provide details.
ГўВ‘ВЎ
Provide the details of each transaction.
ГўВ‘Вў
Send the completed form to Central 1 as instructed on the form.
Figure 8: Request to Process AFT Returns, Form 1249
If there are a significant number of returns and the problem isnГўВҖВҷt attributed to Central 1, the returns will be processed on a best efforts basis.
Related Information
Requests to Process AFT Returns,
Form 1249
END
